dungeon: GENUINE ROTF — a LARGE multi-dungeon HUNT/portal-hop stream (~370s, 35 dungeon entries / ~20 bossend groups, fast hub-hopping). Most fights are brief and chat is player-banter-dominated, but THREE solid finds: (1) a MYSTERY-BOX SHOP economy (named purchasable boxes w/ prices), (2) The Forgotten King base-game taunts (corroboration), (3) a 'Potion of Vitality Consumed ++' stat-pot line (fills the Vitality-naming gap). No priority no-footage dungeon (Craig's Castle / Gate to Underworld / ToDD / Broken Forest / Showcase) was clearly identifiable in the fast transitions.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+minimaps: a rapid 35-ENTRY portal-hop across many biomes — dark SPACE/VOID arenas, RED/LAVA arenas, GREY/GOLD CHECKERED (Shatters-style) grid arenas, GREEN grass realms, BROWN/desert dungeons, and PURPLE/magenta zones. Many entries are seconds apart (t001-t007 within 11s = a hub/portal room). No single contiguous dungeon layout (it's a hunt across many short dungeons); arena geometry varies per biome. The big b033_246s window resolves to the player opening a SHOP/box menu in a green-realm + a red-bullet boss arena.
